notes: Worktrees become first-class: create from the palette (agent follows), persistent badged sidebar rows, safe delete (terminals close first, idle tabs swept, unmerged work prompts merge-or-discard), and opt-in dangerous mode for agents. Command palette: Zed-style command grammar, toggle states on rows, two-step theme picker. Simpler AI Trail: last 3 chapters, full prompt on expand. Dev builds show a Rebuilt pill when a newer build lands on disk.
